stemHtml: According to ICAO Annex 7, a nationality mark has to be chosen from the series of...

options.a: letters, numbers, or a combination of letters and numbers, and shall be assigned by the State of Registry or common mark registering authority.
options.b: nationality symbols included in the radio call signs allocated to the State of Registry by the International Civil Aviation Organisation.
options.c: nationality symbols included in the radio call signs allocated to the State of Registry by the International Telecommunication Union.
options.d: symbols included in the radio call signs allocated to the International Civil Aviation Organisation by the International Telecommunication Union.
